name: TestWaitForJ1939PG
title: TestWaitForJ1939PG
syntax: long TestWaitForJ1939PG (dword aPGN, dword aSourceAddress, dword aDestinationAddress, dword aTimeout);
description: Waits for the occurrence of the specified message aMessage. Should the message not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: Message that should be awaited. Must be a J1939 parameter group.

parameters.name: aPGN
parameters.description: Parameter Group Number (with data page) of the message that should be awaited.

parameters.name: aSourceAddress
parameters.description: Source address of the message that should be awaited or 0xFFFFFFFF if source address is ignored.

parameters.name: aDestinationAddress
parameters.description: Destination address of the message that should be awaited or 0xFFFFFFFF if destination address is ignored.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms](Transmission of 0: no timeout controlling).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
